_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: Top hit calling was performed using robust z scoring methodology that is frequently employed in high-throughput RNAi screens to identify positives
resourceName: Acumen eX3 laser-scanning fluorescence microplate cytometer
details: Successfully used for high-throughput immunofluorescence-based kinome screening with robust z scoring methodology
